global.synopsis: Show help for the active context
Restart and reconnect the engine after a disconnection
Open Runtime Center with runtime diagnostics
Configuration hub for IDE, data location pointer, and AI settings
Copy the latest non-user output message
Copy the full visible message history
List reachable contexts
Return to previous context
Save session state to disk
Load a saved session from disk
Show engine diagnostics and persistence paths
Reset the current session
Show bug-report instructions
Create a diagnostic snapshot file for issue attachments
Clear chat history
Exit the REPL
Store a typed variable in the current scope (--number|--string|--bool)
Read a variable from the current scope
Show the error code catalog (filter with /errors <family>)
List all cross-language shared keys and values
Clear all cross-language shared keys

ai.synopsis: Guided setup for the AI endpoint, model, and API key
Set the AI endpoint URL (example: /set endpoint http://localhost:11434)
Set the AI model name (example: /set model codellama:latest)
Set the API key for remote endpoints (example: /set apikey sk-...)
Override the system prompt for this session

code.synopsis: Search scripts across all supported languages

math.synopsis: Run a boolean logic command (prefix or infix)

sandbox.synopsis: Open a file in the configured IDE

customcommand.synopsis: Define an executable macro body (global by default, or context-bound)
List registered custom commands with scope
Execute a custom command by name
Show the resolved custom command body and scope
Delete a custom command (interactive if scope is ambiguous)

script.synopsis: Run a script or last buffer
Show unified diff between two versions
Restore an old version as new latest
Search scripts by name, language, or content
